post.subject: Im a stupid cunt
post.body:
I was supposed to be in class at 9am this morning. I didnt sleep all of last night. But I managed to fall asleep at 8:15 this morning!! EIGHT-FUCKING-FIFTEEN!!! TWENTY MINUTES BEFORE I WAS GOING TO LEAVE!! I woke up at 2pm so very very pissed off!

The really strange thing is, I only started getting tired at 6:30am...
